```{r}
# Load R packages for data cleaning 
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(readxl)
```

```{r}
# Read in TIGER Gene Panel
genes <- read_excel("TIGER2_gene panel.xlsx") %>%
  select(Genes = "ADA") # Rename column ADA to Genes
```

```{r}
# Read in Total HLH Patient Data
data <- read_excel("Patient Data /HLH_data.xlsx", sheet = "TOTAL")

# Initial data cleaning
data <- data %>%
  slice(1:112) %>% # Only keep the patient data
  mutate(Perforin_expression_percent = as.numeric(`Perforin expression %`)) %>%
  mutate(sex = as.factor(Sex)) %>% # Change factor
  mutate(Result_clean = case_when(
      str_detect(Result, regex("pol.*ism", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Polymorphism",
      str_detect(Result, regex("mu.*tion found", ignore_case = TRUE))            ~ "Mutation",
      str_detect(Result, regex("sequence var", ignore_case = TRUE))              ~ "Sequence variance",
      str_detect(Result, regex("no (mutation|pathogenic|clearly)", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "No mutation",
      str_detect(Result, regex("no result|no data", ignore_case = TRUE))         ~ "No data",
      is.na(Result) ~ NA_character_,
      TRUE ~ Result)) %>% # Fix spelling mistakes 
  clean_names()
```

```{r}
# Remove columns
data_clean <- data %>%
  rename(`Perforin Expression %` = perforin_expression_percent_2) %>% # Rename column name 
  rename('Patient ID' = id) %>% # Rename column id to Patient ID
  select(-"parent_nationality", -"familial_disease", -"parental_consanguinity", -"dob", 
         -"episode_number", -"age", -"coll_date", -"rec_date", -"source", -"location",
         -"clinician", -"test_set_name", -"result", -"mutation", -"perforin_expression_percent",
         -"perforin_code", -"peak_mfi", -"gra", -"s_cd25_pg_ml", -"perforin_expression",
         -('hemoglobin_g_l':'treatment_applied'),
         -"sex_2", -"result_clean") %>% # Filter out columns
  mutate(across(starts_with("c_"), as.numeric)) %>% # Convert SNPs to numerical vector rather than factor
  filter(if_all(starts_with("c_"), ~!is.na(.))) %>% # Filter for patients with SNP data
  mutate(`Perforin Expression %` = 
           if_else(`Patient ID` == 91, 0.56, `Perforin Expression %`)) %>% # Impute for missing data
  mutate(`Perforin Expression %` = 
           if_else(`Patient ID` == 103, 0.22, `Perforin Expression %`)) %>% # Impute for missing data
  mutate(`Perforin Expression %` =
           if_else(`Patient ID` == 21, 0.19, `Perforin Expression %`)) %>% # Impute for missing data
  mutate(`Perforin Expression %` = `Perforin Expression %` * 100)
```

```{r}
# Calculate average perforin expression for abnormal expression
mean_abnormal <- data %>%
  filter(perforin_expression == "Abnormal") %>%
  summarise(m = mean(perforin_expression_percent_2, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pull(m)
```

```{r}
# Filter for HLH-diagnosed patients
patients_hlh <- data_clean %>%
  filter(diagnosis == "HLH")

# Filter for patients with an empty diagnosis
patients_unknown <- data_clean %>%
  filter(is.na(diagnosis))

# Filter for patients with non-HLH diagnosis
patients_non <- data_clean %>%
  filter(!is.na(diagnosis), diagnosis != "HLH")
```

```{r}
data_labelled <- data_clean %>%
  mutate(diagnosis_group = case_when(
    diagnosis == "HLH"         ~ "HLH",
    is.na(diagnosis)           ~ "Unknown",
    TRUE                       ~ "Non-HLH"
  )) %>%
  mutate(diagnosis_group = factor(diagnosis_group,
                                  levels = c("HLH", "Non-HLH", "Unknown")))
```
